title: Register core knowledge vault MCP for deterministic read-only note retrieval
objective: Establish a governance-approved core MCP ID for read-only vault retrieval with deterministic output and strict boundary guards.
constraints: No runtime implementation in ai-governance repository.
Read-only contract for v0.1; write APIs are explicitly out of scope.
Registry and allowlist remain unchanged until human approval.

governance_rationale.need: A centrally governed note-vault capability is required for deterministic evidence retrieval without service-specific MCP ID fragmentation.
governance_rationale.boundary: Enforce read-only file access under configured vault root with no network side effects and no write operations.
controls: human_gate_required=true for initial registration and subsequent boundary expansion
deterministic ordering and fixed error envelope for all verdict-relevant responses
path traversal guard and file size limits in runtime adapter
